roa.docketEntryComment: FELONY PRELIMINARY
FELONY PRELIMINARY
MARSDEN MOT-DEN;MO W/D NG PLEA-GRTD;ADV WVS CONST RTS;PLD G CT1-459PC/F/1CRT GRNT DA MO DISM CTS2&3/STRIKE ALLEG PURS667D&E,667,5(B)PC PRIORCONT TO 7/18/95 FOR SENT AT 9AM IN D26
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1/STRIKE/GTW///TO BE HEARD WITH SC#153688//PC:950427/1030/S22/TR:950619/0930/S22
MO W/D PLEA G-MO W/D;A/JWV;PROB DEN;CT1SP6Y(U);ALLEG667(A)(1)PC-5Y,C/SPRI667,5(B)PC-1Y,C/S$200RF;TOTSP12YRS;ADV PAROLE RTS;CTS504D
CT FND GOOD CAUSE CONT;TIME WVD;CONT 12/1/95 9AM D26 SENT/MO W/D PLEA G
CONT 11/22/95 9AM D26 FOR SENT/HRG ON DEFT'S MO W/D PLEA OF GUILTYPERS WVS TIME FOR SENT
TIME WVD FOR SENT;CONT 11/3/95 9AM D26 FOR SENT/TS MO W/D G PLEA
CONT 10/30/95 9AM D26 FOR SENT/MO W/D NG PLEA
CONT TO 9/11/95 FOR SENT/MO W/D NG PLEA AT 9AM IN D26;TW FOR SENT PERS
DEF CNSL MO TO W/DRAW-GRTD;DEFT WISHES TO W/DRAW HIS G PLEA;T/WVD SENTCONT TO 8/18/95 FOR SENT/MO W/D G PLEA AT 9AM IN D26
TRANSF TO D26 FOR TRIAL
CONT TO 6/26/95 AT 930AM IN D22 FOR TRIAL
CONT TO 6/22/95 AT 930AM IN D22 FOR TRIAL
MARSDEN MOTION-DEN;DEEMED PRETRIED;TRANSF F/W TO D22
CONT 6/21/95 TRIAL 930AM D22 (STRIKE CASE)
D25 FOR FUR PTC F/W;CONT 6/20/95 930AM TRIAL D22
CONT TO 6/21/95 FOR FUR PTC/STRIKE CASE AT 845AM IN D25
/TRANS 21 FW: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//TR:950619/0930/S22
DEEMED PRETRIED
HTA, B/S $15,000, MISD CERT TO SUP CT
B/S $15,000, CDC HOLD
